series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications for education loans, agreement to repay loan forms, collection documents, verification of repayment documents and other related documents and correspondence. These records may contain social security numbers which are not a matter of public record for purposes of Ohio Revised Code Section 149.03.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on the computer, then the paper copy is destroyed. ; Microform: Any images on microfiche are to be retained 10 years from the date the grant or loan application is received by the Division. Then the microform is to be destroyed. ; Electronic: Images are to be retained 10 years from the date the grant or loan application is received by the Division. Then the image is to be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
